@rapp/rapp2mcs_factory.name: RAPP2MCS Factory
@rapp/rapp2mcs_factory.title: The Forge

abilities.text: Scan → Analyze → Normalize → Package → Deploy. One call, one Copilot Studio agent in your Power Platform env.
No Azure Functions, no custom connectors, no custom Dataverse tables. Only `shared_commondataserviceforapps`.
Carries the AIBAST_RAPP/scripts pipeline inline as a gzipped-base64 bundle; unpacks to a temp dir on first use.

@rapp/topic_wizard.name: Topic Wizard
@rapp/topic_wizard.title: The Cartographer

abilities.text: Walk each agents/*.py and propose the matching MCS topic shape: topic-only, web-browse, memory-save, or memory-recall.
Emit a self-contained HTML wizard with live YAML preview. No CDN, no server.
Write fully-built .mcs.yml from the wizard's exported config. OOTB Dataverse annotation only; no Azure Functions.

@rapp/topic_wizard.flavor_text: "A guide is the difference between a path and a wilderness." --RAR/agents/@rapp/topic_wizard_agent.py

@kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory.name: RappLeviathanFactory
@kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory.title: The Anatomist

abilities.text: When ~ enters, generate up to five Estate tokens — Sanctum (soul), Polity (will), Works (hands), Press (eyes), Commons (mouth) — each a 1/1 Legendary Creature you control.
~ has no sibling dependencies. Drop it into any RAPP brainstem and it runs.
Diagnose the realm before forging. If the brainstem, LLM, or workspace cannot sustain a Leviathan, ~ does not enter.

@kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory.flavor_text: “One file. One operator. One leviathan. Five organs to remember, decide, produce, judge, and speak.”

typed_abilities.name: Design
typed_abilities.text: Preview the leviathan blueprint. Estates, industries, neighborhoods, factories — no files written.

typed_abilities.name: Generate
typed_abilities.text: Forge the full five-organ being. Writes every file each estate needs to live.

typed_abilities.name: Provision
typed_abilities.text: Mark the rappid live. ~ enters the lattice and begins to think.
